_metadata.description: Government policy-to-sector mapping for India tailwind scoring. Update quarterly.

policies.name: PLI Scheme — IT Hardware & Electronics
policies.description: ₹17,000 Cr incentive for electronics manufacturing (laptops, tablets, servers)

policies.name: PLI Scheme — Pharmaceuticals & API
policies.description: ₹15,000 Cr for bulk drug & medical devices manufacturing

policies.name: PLI Scheme — Auto & Auto Components
policies.description: ₹25,938 Cr for advanced automotive technology and EV components

policies.name: PLI Scheme — Textiles (MMF & Technical)
policies.description: ₹10,683 Cr for man-made fibre and technical textiles

policies.name: PLI Scheme — Food Processing
policies.description: ₹10,900 Cr for food processing and millet-based products

policies.name: Defense Indigenization & Positive List
policies.description: 410+ items banned from import. Target: 75% domestic procurement by FY29

policies.name: India Semiconductor Mission
policies.description: ₹76,000 Cr for semiconductor fabrication and OSAT facilities

policies.name: National Green Hydrogen Mission
policies.description: ₹19,744 Cr for green hydrogen production — 5 MT target by 2030

policies.name: PM Gati Shakti — Infrastructure Push
policies.description: ₹10 lakh Cr NIP for multi-modal infrastructure connectivity

policies.name: Digital India & IT Modernization
policies.description: Government digitization, UPI expansion, cybersecurity infrastructure

policies.name: FAME III / EV Ecosystem Support
policies.description: ₹10,000 Cr+ for EV adoption, charging infrastructure, battery manufacturing

policies.name: PM Awas Yojana (Urban & Rural Housing)
policies.description: 3 Cr additional houses target — massive demand for building materials

policies.name: China+1 Manufacturing Shift
policies.description: Global supply chain diversification — India as alternative manufacturing hub

policies.name: PLI Scheme — Solar PV Manufacturing
policies.description: ₹24,000 Cr for solar cell and module manufacturing
